prompt: Hand category: top pair or better. Board fit: the hand connects cleanly with the board and is ahead of many weaker made hands. Classify the range bucket.
why_v1: Strong means the made hand fits the board well and sits ahead of many weaker made hands.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This is strong because the hand is already made, connects cleanly with the board, and beats many weaker made hands.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This is strong because the board fit supports a made hand that is ahead of many weaker made hands.
